<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<EntityDescriptor entityID="techcorp-idp" xmlns="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:metadata" xmlns:query="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:metadata:ext:query" xmlns:mdattr="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:metadata:attribute" xmlns:saml="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:assertion" xmlns:xenc="http://www.w3.org/2001/04/xmlenc#" xmlns:xenc11="http://www.w3.org/2009/xmlenc11#" xmlns:alg="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:metadata:algsupport" xmlns:x509qry="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:metadata:X509:query" xmlns:ds="http://www.w3.org/2000/09/xmldsig#">
    <IDPSSODescriptor WantAuthnRequestsSigned="false" protocolSupportEnumeration="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:protocol">
        <ArtifactResolutionService index="0" Binding="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:bindings:SOAP" Location="http://pingam:8081/am/ArtifactResolver/metaAlias/techcorp/idp"/>
        <SingleLogoutService Binding="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:bindings:HTTP-Redirect" Location="http://pingam:8081/am/IDPSloRedirect/metaAlias/techcorp/idp" ResponseLocation="http://pingam:8081/am/IDPSloRedirect/metaAlias/techcorp/idp"/>
        <SingleLogoutService Binding="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:bindings:HTTP-POST" Location="http://pingam:8081/am/IDPSloPOST/metaAlias/techcorp/idp" ResponseLocation="http://pingam:8081/am/IDPSloPOST/metaAlias/techcorp/idp"/>
        <SingleLogoutService Binding="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:bindings:SOAP" Location="http://pingam:8081/am/IDPSloSoap/metaAlias/techcorp/idp"/>
        <ManageNameIDService Binding="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:bindings:HTTP-Redirect" Location="http://pingam:8081/am/IDPMniRedirect/metaAlias/techcorp/idp" ResponseLocation="http://pingam:8081/am/IDPMniRedirect/metaAlias/techcorp/idp"/>
        <ManageNameIDService Binding="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:bindings:HTTP-POST" Location="http://pingam:8081/am/IDPMniPOST/metaAlias/techcorp/idp" ResponseLocation="http://pingam:8081/am/IDPMniPOST/metaAlias/techcorp/idp"/>
        <ManageNameIDService Binding="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:bindings:SOAP" Location="http://pingam:8081/am/IDPMniSoap/metaAlias/techcorp/idp"/>
        <NameIDFormat>urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:1.1:nameid-format:unspecified</NameIDFormat>
        <NameIDFormat>urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:nameid-format:persistent</NameIDFormat>
        <NameIDFormat>urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:nameid-format:transient</NameIDFormat>
        <NameIDFormat>urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:1.1:nameid-format:emailAddress</NameIDFormat>
        <NameIDFormat>urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:1.1:nameid-format:WindowsDomainQualifiedName</NameIDFormat>
        <NameIDFormat>urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:nameid-format:kerberos</NameIDFormat>
        <NameIDFormat>urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:1.1:nameid-format:X509SubjectName</NameIDFormat>
        <SingleSignOnService Binding="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:bindings:HTTP-Redirect" Location="http://pingam:8081/am/SSORedirect/metaAlias/techcorp/idp"/>
        <SingleSignOnService Binding="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:bindings:HTTP-POST" Location="http://pingam:8081/am/SSOPOST/metaAlias/techcorp/idp"/>
        <SingleSignOnService Binding="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:bindings:SOAP" Location="http://pingam:8081/am/SSOSoap/metaAlias/techcorp/idp"/>
        <NameIDMappingService Binding="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:bindings:SOAP" Location="http://pingam:8081/am/NIMSoap/metaAlias/techcorp/idp"/>
        <AssertionIDRequestService Binding="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:bindings:SOAP" Location="http://pingam:8081/am/AIDReqSoap/IDPRole/metaAlias/techcorp/idp"/>
        <AssertionIDRequestService Binding="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:bindings:URI" Location="http://pingam:8081/am/AIDReqUri/IDPRole/metaAlias/techcorp/idp"/>
    </IDPSSODescriptor>
</EntityDescriptor>
data.entityConfig:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<EntityConfig entityID="techcorp-idp" hosted="true" xmlns="urn:sun:fm:SAML:2.0:entityconfig" xmlns:ns6="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:metadata" xmlns:query="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:metadata:ext:query" xmlns:mdattr="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:metadata:attribute" xmlns:saml="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:assertion" xmlns:xenc="http://www.w3.org/2001/04/xmlenc#" xmlns:xenc11="http://www.w3.org/2009/xmlenc11#" xmlns:alg="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:metadata:algsupport" xmlns:x509qry="urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:metadata:X509:query" xmlns:ds="http://www.w3.org/2000/09/xmldsig#">
    <IDPSSOConfig metaAlias="/techcorp/idp">
        <Attribute name="assertionEffectiveTime">
            <Value>600</Value>
        </Attribute>
        <Attribute name="wantNameIDEncrypted">
            <Value>false</Value>
        </Attribute>
        <Attribute name="basicAuthOn">
            <Value>false</Value>
        </Attribute>
        <Attribute name="idpECPSessionMapper">
            <Value>com.sun.identity.saml2.plugins.DefaultIDPECPSessionMapper</Value>
        </Attribute>
        <Attribute name="wantLogoutResponseSigned">
            <Value>false</Value>
        </Attribute>
        <Attribute name="wantMNIRequestSigned">
            <Value>false</Value>
        </Attribute>
        <Attribute name="idpDisableNameIDPersistence">
            <Value>false</Value>
        </Attribute>
        <Attribute name="idpAccountMapper">
            <Value>com.sun.identity.saml2.plugins.DefaultIDPAccountMapper</Value>
        </Attribute>
        <Attribute name="attributeMap">
            <Value>uid=uid</Value>
        </Attribute>
        <Attribute name="wantArtifactResolveSigned">
            <Value>false</Value>
        </Attribute>
        <Attribute name="nameIDFormatMap">
            <Value>urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:1.1:nameid-format:unspecified=cn</Value>
        </Attribute>
        <Attribute name="saeIDPUrl">
            <Value>http://pingam:8081/am/idpsaehandler/metaAlias/techcorp/idp</Value>
        </Attribute>
        <Attribute name="idpAdapterScript">
            <Value>[Empty]</Value>
        </Attribute>
        <Attribute name="assertionCacheEnabled">
            <Value>false</Value>
        </Attribute>
        <Attribute name="cotlist">
            <Value>techcorp-cot</Value>
        </Attribute>
        <Attribute name="wantMNIResponseSigned">
            <Value>false</Value>
        </Attribute>
        <Attribute name="idpAuthncontextClassrefMapping">
            <Value>urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:ac:classes:PasswordProtectedTransport|0||default</Value>
        </Attribute>
        <Attribute name="assertionNotBeforeTimeSkew">
            <Value>600</Value>
        </Attribute>
        <Attribute name="metaAlias">
            <Value>/techcorp/idp</Value>
        </Attribute>
        <Attribute name="wantLogoutRequestSigned">
            <Value>false</Value>
        </Attribute>
        <Attribute name="idpAttributeMapperScript">
            <Value>[Empty]</Value>
        </Attribute>
        <Attribute name="idpAttributeMapper">
            <Value>com.sun.identity.saml2.plugins.DefaultIDPAttributeMapper</Value>
        </Attribute>
        <Attribute name="idpAuthncontextMapper">
            <Value>com.sun.identity.saml2.plugins.DefaultIDPAuthnContextMapper</Value>
        </Attribute>
    </IDPSSOConfig>
</EntityConfig>
